Name.jp: ペンギン海賊・クチバシ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Grants the caster increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시키고, 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせ、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 使自身的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. This attack inflicts increased damage if the caster has no remaining allies.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다. 다른 아군이 존재하지 않는다면 피해량이 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。他の味方がいない場合、与えるダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人。若场上无其他友军存在,则伤害量提升。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGreatly increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 크게 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間大幅にUPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>大幅提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
